diagnostics.message: Trim Heater Outlet 93 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Transfer Pump Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Transfer Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.
Transfer Pump efficiency_percent=54 is outside the recommended operating range.
Trim Heater outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the heater should remain explanatory context only.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

message.content: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-cross-object-mixed-risk-reconnect-spec-plus-pump-update-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","status":"partial","requires_confirmation":true,"answers":[{"summary":"当前围绕已选中的出口流 heater-outlet-93 断开、入口流 feed-93 缺少流量规格，以及已选中泵 pump-14 的出口压目标异常这三类问题生成候选提案。","issues":[{"title":"heater-outlet-93 下游未连接","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]},{"title":"feed-93 缺少流量规格","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"title":"pump-14 出口压力目标低于入口压力","citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"title":"pump-14 效率参数处于建议范围外","citations":["diag-4","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"为 heater-outlet-93 添加下游连接占位以修复断开拓扑","target":{"type":"stream","id":"heater-outlet-93"},"rationale":"诊断直接指出该已选中出口流未连接到任何下游单元或导出端；在当前证据不足以指定真实去向时，可先提出非执行式连接占位，限定为该流的下游去向待确认。","patch":{"connection_placeholder":{"stream_id":"heater-outlet-93","open_end":"downstream","suggested_connection_role":"consumer_or_export_sink","note":"需由用户确认具体下游单元或导出端后再落实"}},"risk_level":"high","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"为 feed-93 补充流量规格占位","target":{"type":"stream","id":"feed-93"},"rationale":"诊断明确指出该已选中进料流缺少流量规格；补充流量占位可作为最小局部修补，不预设具体数值。","patch":{"spec_placeholders":{"flow_rate":{"required":true,"note":"缺少流量规格，需用户提供数值与单位基准"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"将 pump-14 出口压力目标提高到高于入口压力的待确认值","target":{"type":"unit","id":"pump-14"},"rationale":"现有证据显示泵入口流 feed-93 压力为210 kPa，而泵配置的出口压力目标为170 kPa，直接触发“出口压目标低于入口压力”的错误；可提出仅修改该局部参数的待确认更新，并保持目标值未定。","patch":{"parameter_placeholders":{"outlet_pressure_target_kpa":{"constraint":"must_be_greater_than:210","basis_stream_id":"feed-93","note":"需用户确认合适的出口压力目标"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"将 pump-14 效率参数改为推荐范围内的待确认值","target":{"type":"unit","id":"pump-14"},"rationale":"诊断指出 efficiency_percent=54 超出推荐运行范围，但未给出唯一正确值；因此仅建议将该参数调整到推荐范围内的占位值，避免臆造具体设定。","patch":{"parameter_placeholders":{"efficiency_percent":{"constraint":"set_within_recommended_operating_range","current_value":54,"note":"需用户确认目标效率"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-4","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]}],"confidence":0.91}]}

answers.text: 当前围绕已选中的出口流 heater-outlet-93 断开、入口流 feed-93 缺少流量规格，以及已选中泵 pump-14 的出口压目标异常这三类问题生成候选提案。

proposed_actions.title: 为 heater-outlet-93 添加下游连接占位以修复断开拓扑
proposed_actions.rationale: 诊断直接指出该已选中出口流未连接到任何下游单元或导出端；在当前证据不足以指定真实去向时，可先提出非执行式连接占位，限定为该流的下游去向待确认。

proposed_actions.title: 为 feed-93 补充流量规格占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 诊断明确指出该已选中进料流缺少流量规格；补充流量占位可作为最小局部修补，不预设具体数值。

proposed_actions.title: 将 pump-14 出口压力目标提高到高于入口压力的待确认值
proposed_actions.rationale: 现有证据显示泵入口流 feed-93 压力为210 kPa，而泵配置的出口压力目标为170 kPa，直接触发“出口压目标低于入口压力”的错误；可提出仅修改该局部参数的待确认更新，并保持目标值未定。

Transfer Pump Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Transfer Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.
Transfer Pump efficiency_percent=54 is outside the recommended operating range.
Trim Heater outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the heater should remain explanatory context only.
